title: Critical Hit Helper
description: This mod helps you understand when to strike to perform a critical hit.
body:
Recently, I released a mod called Smooth Boot, which improves **CPU scheduling** in Minecraft. It is a fork of the old **Smooth Boot (reloaded)** and supports previously unavailable game versions !

**More details at this** [link](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-boot) .




## CriticalHitHelper

**CriticalHitHelper** helps determine when a critical hit can be dealt to an entity. An indicator appears above the crosshair to show this. It's especially useful in **PvP**, particularly in tight spaces.
